mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM blog_article WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM blog_article WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM blog_article WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM blog_article WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND is_recommend = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM blog_article WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE blog_article SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE blog_article SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) FROM blog_article WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time <= #{endTime}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) FROM blog_article WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time <= #{endTime}
